nodes.title: Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.
nodes.description: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting headless services than driving a GUI — frames an axis against browser-operating agents (Claude in Chrome, etc.). By H2 2026, expect a "headless-preferred" metadata standard on MCP / Agent Registry surfaces. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.
nodes.short_label: OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.
nodes.title: OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.
nodes.description: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AI SaaS 間の OAuth 横断信任が最大のエンタープライズリスクに** — Vercel–Context.ai 事例は、社員が個人で連携した AI Office SaaS が企業の Google Workspace 全体を侵害経路に変えることを示した。2026 Q3 までに、主要 SSO プロバイダ（Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace）は **AI SaaS 向け OAuth スコープを "AI 拡張" カテゴリとして分離**、管理者が「Allow All」既定を一括ブロックできる制御を標準化する。CASB / SSPM ベンダーも「AI 連携が閲覧する企業データ量」を独立メトリクスとしてレポート化する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **AI SaaS 間の OAuth 横断信任が最大のエンタープライズリスクに** — Vercel–Context.ai 事例は、社員が個人で連携した AI Office SaaS が企業の Google Workspace 全体を侵害経路に変えることを示した。2026 Q3 までに、主要 SSO プロバイダ（Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace）は **AI SaaS 向け OAuth スコープを "AI 拡張" カテゴリとして分離**、管理者が「Allow All」既定を一括ブロックできる制御を標準化する。CASB / SSPM ベンダーも「AI 連携が閲覧する企業データ量」を独立メトリクスとしてレポート化する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.
nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.short_label: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.title: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。 In plain language: Microsoftが「AIエージェント管理」に値段を付けた — 他クラウドも追随するか顧客を失うか。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo. In plain language: Microsoft puso un precio al control de agentes IA — otros clouds copiarán o perderán clientes. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence. In plain language: Naglagay ang Microsoft ng presyo sa kontrol ng AI agents — ibang clouds dapat sumunod o mawalan ng kustomer. In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel. In plain language: Microsoft put a price tag on controlling AI agents — other clouds will copy or lose customers. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。 In plain language: Microsoftが「AIエージェント管理」に値段を付けた — 他クラウドも追随するか顧客を失うか。 In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo. In plain language: Microsoft puso un precio al control de agentes IA — otros clouds copiarán o perderán clientes. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence. In plain language: Naglagay ang Microsoft ng presyo sa kontrol ng AI agents — ibang clouds dapat sumunod o mawalan ng kustomer. In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules
nodes.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules
title.ja: AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化
title.es: El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes
title.fil: Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI

description.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化 — Q3 2026 までに米国の少なくとも 1 州が、Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を可決。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅襲撃 + 4/15 CNBC のデータセンター反発記事 + 4/26 Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェント トラフィックを監視できていない」) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバ レジストリ、認証情報のボールティング + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサル ログアウト) が規制を前倒しで引き寄せる。米国の州 (CA、NY、TX のいずれかが有力) が Q3 2026 までに **「エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、MCP コール チェーンのロギング、アクションごとの同意」** を義務付ける法令を成立させ、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映。EU AI Act 第 26 条施行も並行して始動。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化 — Q3 2026 までに米国の少なくとも 1 州が、Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を可決。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅襲撃 + 4/15 CNBC のデータセンター反発記事 + 4/26 Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェント トラフィックを監視できていない」) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバ レジストリ、認証情報のボールティング + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサル ログアウト) が規制を前倒しで引き寄せる。米国の州 (CA、NY、TX のいずれかが有力) が Q3 2026 までに **「エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、MCP コール チェーンのロギング、アクションごとの同意」** を義務付ける法令を成立させ、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映。EU AI Act 第 26 条施行も並行して始動。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。 In plain language: Microsoft が AI エージェント ID を Microsoft・Amazon・Google クラウド間で動かせるようにした — まもなくその仕様を固定する公開規格が出る。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. In plain language: Microsoft acaba de hacer que las IDs de agente AI funcionen entre nubes Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo fijará. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Pinagana ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang i-lock-in iyon ng public spec. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Microsoft just made AI agent IDs work across Microsoft, Amazon, and Google clouds — soon a public spec will lock that in. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。 In plain language: Microsoft が AI エージェント ID を Microsoft・Amazon・Google クラウド間で動かせるようにした — まもなくその仕様を固定する公開規格が出る。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex. In plain language: Microsoft acaba de hacer que las IDs de agente AI funcionen entre nubes Microsoft, Amazon y Google — pronto una especificación pública lo fijará. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage. In plain language: Pinagana ng Microsoft ang AI agent IDs sa Microsoft, Amazon, at Google clouds — malapit nang i-lock-in iyon ng public spec. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Hyperscaler-partner enterprise-AI JV template publishes by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the May 4 parallel-JV launch — Anthropic's $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + OpenAI's parallel "The Development Company" announcement — combined with the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicitly out, existing deployments on a 6-month sunset window), the Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), and the Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) forces ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) to publish a structurally analogous JV template with mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment in a 10-Q footnote.** Forcing function is the dual disclosure-pressure: the buyside is being asked to fund $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + the parallel JV stacks without a comparable disclosure shape from the hyperscalers whose Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments are the operative service-delivery substrate. The hyperscaler that publishes first locks in the template. The Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release are the operative anchor signals; Microsoft is the most-likely first mover because Bedrock-equivalent Foundry already has the audited-AI-revenue precedent set by the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, and Microsoft has Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration through Foundry to make a parallel JV plausible. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the May 4 parallel-JV launch — Anthropic's $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture with Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M each commitment) + OpenAI's parallel "The Development Company" announcement — combined with the May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicitly out, existing deployments on a 6-month sunset window), the Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), and the Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) forces ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) to publish a structurally analogous JV template with mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment in a 10-Q footnote.** Forcing function is the dual disclosure-pressure: the buyside is being asked to fund $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + the parallel JV stacks without a comparable disclosure shape from the hyperscalers whose Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments are the operative service-delivery substrate. The hyperscaler that publishes first locks in the template. The Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release are the operative anchor signals; Microsoft is the most-likely first mover because Bedrock-equivalent Foundry already has the audited-AI-revenue precedent set by the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, and Microsoft has Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration through Foundry to make a parallel JV plausible. In plain language: After the Pentagon shut Anthropic out, Anthropic and OpenAI both launched investor-funded business arms on the same day — soon a cloud company will copy that shape. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q4までに、5月4日の並行JVローンチ — AnthropicのBlackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachsとの$1.5BエンタープライズAI合弁会社（各社$300Mコミット） + OpenAIの並行「The Development Company」発表 — に加え、5月1日の8ベンダーPentagon機密ネットワーク除外（Anthropicは明示的に除外、既存導入は6ヶ月サンセット）、4月7日のAnthropic Project Glasswingゲート配布前例（約50のローンチパートナー + 約40の重要ソフトウェアインフラ組織、$100Mの利用クレジット + $4Mのオープンソースセキュリティ寄付）、4月28日〜5月1日のRSAC 2026スタック（Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trustフレーミング）が組み合わさり、1社以上のハイパースケーラーパートナー（Microsoft / AWS / Google）に対し、必須の倫理カーブアウト言語 + 監査済みAIサービス売上シェアセグメントを10-Q脚注に含めた構造的に類似のJVテンプレートを公表することを強いる。** 強制関数は二重の開示プレッシャー: バイサイドは$50B（Anthropicラウンド） + $122B（OpenAIラウンド） + 並行JVスタックへの資金供給を求められているが、Bedrock / Foundry / Vertexの展開が運用上のサービス提供基盤となっているハイパースケーラー側からは同等の開示形状が出ていない。最初に公表したハイパースケーラーがテンプレートを固定する。Microsoftの5月1日 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClawオープンソースリリースが運用上のアンカーシグナル。Microsoftが最有力の先駆者となる根拠は、Bedrock相当のFoundryが4月29日の$37B AIランレート単一ライン項目開示で監査済みAI売上前例を既に確立しており、加えてMicrosoftはAnthropic Mythos + Foundry経由のClaude統合を持つため、並行JVが現実的になる点。 In plain language: PentagonがAnthropicを締め出した後、AnthropicとOpenAIは同日に投資家資金で支えられた事業部門を立ち上げた — 近いうちにクラウド企業がその形をコピーするだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026 el lanzamiento paralelo de JVs del 4 mayo — el joint venture de IA empresarial de $1.5B de Anthropic con Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M cada uno de compromiso) + el anuncio paralelo de OpenAI "The Development Company" — combinado con la exclusión Pentagon de redes clasificadas de 8 vendors del 1 mayo (Anthropic explícitamente fuera, despliegues existentes con ventana de retiro de 6 meses), el precedente del 7 abril Anthropic Project Glasswing de distribución gated (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software, $100M en créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source), y el stack RSAC 2026 del 28 abril - 1 mayo (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + framing CSA Zero Trust) fuerza a ≥1 partner hyperscaler (Microsoft / AWS / Google) a publicar una plantilla de JV estructuralmente análoga con lenguaje obligatorio de cláusulas éticas + segmento auditado de revenue-share AI-services en una nota al pie 10-Q.** La función forzante es la presión dual de divulgación: al buyside se le pide financiar $50B (ronda Anthropic) + $122B (ronda OpenAI) + los stacks paralelos de JV sin una forma comparable de divulgación de los hyperscalers cuyos despliegues Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex son el sustrato operativo de service-delivery. El hyperscaler que publique primero fija la plantilla. El Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 mayo + el release open-source de Cisco DefenseClaw son las señales de anclaje operativas; Microsoft es el primer movedor más probable porque Foundry equivalente a Bedrock ya tiene el precedente de ingresos AI auditados sentado por la divulgación single-line-item de $37B AI run-rate del 29 abril, y Microsoft tiene Anthropic Mythos + integración Claude a través de Foundry para hacer plausible una JV paralela. In plain language: Después de que el Pentágono dejó fuera a Anthropic, Anthropic y OpenAI lanzaron el mismo día brazos de negocio financiados por inversores — pronto una empresa cloud copiará esa forma. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026 ang May 4 parallel-JV launch — ang $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture ng Anthropic kasama ang Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M bawat isa commitment) + ang parallel "The Development Company" announcement ng OpenAI — kasama ang May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicit na out, ang mga existing deployments sa 6-month sunset window), ang Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), at ang Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) ay pinipilit ang ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) na maglathala ng structurally analogous JV template na may mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment sa 10-Q footnote.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual disclosure-pressure: hinihingan ang buyside na pondohan ang $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + ang parallel JV stacks na walang comparable disclosure shape mula sa mga hyperscaler na ang Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments ang operative service-delivery substrate. Ang hyperscaler na unang maglalathala ang magla-lock-in sa template. Ang Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release ang operative anchor signals; ang Microsoft ang pinaka-likely first mover dahil ang Bedrock-equivalent Foundry ay mayroon nang audited-AI-revenue precedent na itinakda ng Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, at ang Microsoft ay may Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration sa pamamagitan ng Foundry para gawing plausible ang parallel JV. In plain language: Pagkatapos i-shut out ng Pentagon ang Anthropic, parehong naglunsad ang Anthropic at OpenAI ng investor-funded business arms sa parehong araw — malapit nang kopyahin ng isang cloud company ang shape na iyon. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026 el lanzamiento paralelo de JVs del 4 mayo — el joint venture de IA empresarial de $1.5B de Anthropic con Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M cada uno de compromiso) + el anuncio paralelo de OpenAI "The Development Company" — combinado con la exclusión Pentagon de redes clasificadas de 8 vendors del 1 mayo (Anthropic explícitamente fuera, despliegues existentes con ventana de retiro de 6 meses), el precedente del 7 abril Anthropic Project Glasswing de distribución gated (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software, $100M en créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source), y el stack RSAC 2026 del 28 abril - 1 mayo (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + framing CSA Zero Trust) fuerza a ≥1 partner hyperscaler (Microsoft / AWS / Google) a publicar una plantilla de JV estructuralmente análoga con lenguaje obligatorio de cláusulas éticas + segmento auditado de revenue-share AI-services en una nota al pie 10-Q.** La función forzante es la presión dual de divulgación: al buyside se le pide financiar $50B (ronda Anthropic) + $122B (ronda OpenAI) + los stacks paralelos de JV sin una forma comparable de divulgación de los hyperscalers cuyos despliegues Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex son el sustrato operativo de service-delivery. El hyperscaler que publique primero fija la plantilla. El Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 mayo + el release open-source de Cisco DefenseClaw son las señales de anclaje operativas; Microsoft es el primer movedor más probable porque Foundry equivalente a Bedrock ya tiene el precedente de ingresos AI auditados sentado por la divulgación single-line-item de $37B AI run-rate del 29 abril, y Microsoft tiene Anthropic Mythos + integración Claude a través de Foundry para hacer plausible una JV paralela. In plain language: Después de que el Pentágono dejó fuera a Anthropic, Anthropic y OpenAI lanzaron el mismo día brazos de negocio financiados por inversores — pronto una empresa cloud copiará esa forma. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026 ang May 4 parallel-JV launch — ang $1.5B enterprise-AI joint venture ng Anthropic kasama ang Blackstone + Hellman & Friedman + Goldman Sachs ($300M bawat isa commitment) + ang parallel "The Development Company" announcement ng OpenAI — kasama ang May 1 8-vendor Pentagon classified-network exclusion (Anthropic explicit na out, ang mga existing deployments sa 6-month sunset window), ang Apr 7 Anthropic Project Glasswing gated-distribution precedent (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs, $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations), at ang Apr 28 - May 1 RSAC 2026 stack (Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA Zero Trust framing) ay pinipilit ang ≥1 hyperscaler partner (Microsoft / AWS / Google) na maglathala ng structurally analogous JV template na may mandatory ethics-carveout language + audited AI-services-revenue-share segment sa 10-Q footnote.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual disclosure-pressure: hinihingan ang buyside na pondohan ang $50B (Anthropic round) + $122B (OpenAI round) + ang parallel JV stacks na walang comparable disclosure shape mula sa mga hyperscaler na ang Bedrock / Foundry / Vertex deployments ang operative service-delivery substrate. Ang hyperscaler na unang maglalathala ang magla-lock-in sa template. Ang Microsoft May 1 Agent 365 GA + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release ang operative anchor signals; ang Microsoft ang pinaka-likely first mover dahil ang Bedrock-equivalent Foundry ay mayroon nang audited-AI-revenue precedent na itinakda ng Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate single-line-item disclosure, at ang Microsoft ay may Anthropic Mythos + Claude integration sa pamamagitan ng Foundry para gawing plausible ang parallel JV. In plain language: Pagkatapos i-shut out ng Pentagon ang Anthropic, parehong naglunsad ang Anthropic at OpenAI ng investor-funded business arms sa parehong araw — malapit nang kopyahin ng isang cloud company ang shape na iyon. In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground.** GitHub Actions indirect prompt injection PoCs reproduce across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Copilot — three vendors at once. Through Q2-Q3 2026, a new supply-chain security category, "Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration," will rise to the top of CIS / OWASP risk lists. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. nodes.title: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 5 clusters. Largest is 'Agent Runtime Security' (10 of 34 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
nodes.short_label: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
nodes.title: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
nodes.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
title.ja: 推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる

title.fil: Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers

description.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive
nodes.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
