title.en: The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive
title.ja: AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格
title.es: La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria
title.fil: Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
detail.prediction_summary: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. description.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate. **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance. Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance. Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance. **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate. **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

label.en: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.
label.ja: 2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する
label.es: Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
label.fil: Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab. description.ja: **2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 4 clusters. Largest is 'Agent Runtime Security' (11 of 34 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.es: Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

label.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.
label.ja: 2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される
label.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
label.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

description.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish. **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar. **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.title: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。 In plain language: 攻撃者がAIツールのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを組み合わせて共有AIサーバを乗っ取れる。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así. In plain language: Hackers pueden encadenar bug de tooling AI con bug del kernel Linux para tomar servidores AI compartidos. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito. In plain language: Pwedeng pagsamahin ng hackers ang AI-tooling bug + Linux-kernel bug para makuha ang shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

summary_short_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral.
summary_short_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector.
