detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way. In plain language: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers. In plain language: In plain language:

La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito. nodes.title: Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: 27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.
nodes.short_label: 27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.
nodes.title: 27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「27B Dense + 1M context」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ・ローカル LLM の事実上の標準ポジション** — Qwen3.6-27B の公開は、「MoE のルーティング複雑性なし・RTX 4090 1 枚で回る・1M context・Apache 2.0」という組み合わせがフラグシップ級コーディング能力に届くことを実証した。2026 Q3 までに Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma 系列がそれぞれ 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama 系ライセンスのモデルを投入し、70B+ MoE の差別化要素は「マルチモーダル理解」「ツール網羅」「長期推論」に限定される。オンプレ推論の既定 VRAM 要件は RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB から **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB** へ下方シフト。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent". In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. nodes.label: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack

nodes.title: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. description.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
summary.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。 In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la ola de updates Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning con contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y 2x más contexto (engineering conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 mar runtime 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors + guía de fine-tuning NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage (rendimiento RTX-laptop sube 2.5x) — combinada con la ventaja de throughput 29% de SGLang en H100 (prefix-cache RadixAttention compartida con vLLM a ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv del 28 abril-3 mayo sobre KV-cache (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace al entrenamiento con GPU consumer operativamente equivalente al baseline 2024 con GPU empresarial; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un tier managed Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime managed + IAM + audit + pool GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning antes de los ciclos AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría procurement-friction: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven economía de reducción 70% VRAM en GPUs consumer, pero la seguridad + governance empresarial demandan un plano de control managed que el CLI open-source no provee; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM. In plain language: El entrenamiento de LLMs local es ahora el doble de rápido y usa 70% menos VRAM — pronto las grandes nubes lo rentarán como servicio managed. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay parehong may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Ang local-LLM training ngayon ay dalawang beses na mas mabilis at gumagamit ng 70% mas kaunting VRAM — malapit na itong i-rent out ng malalaking clouds bilang managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

summary_short_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。 In plain language: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la ola de updates Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning con contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y 2x más contexto (engineering conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 mar runtime 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors + guía de fine-tuning NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage (rendimiento RTX-laptop sube 2.5x) — combinada con la ventaja de throughput 29% de SGLang en H100 (prefix-cache RadixAttention compartida con vLLM a ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv del 28 abril-3 mayo sobre KV-cache (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace al entrenamiento con GPU consumer operativamente equivalente al baseline 2024 con GPU empresarial; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un tier managed Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime managed + IAM + audit + pool GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning antes de los ciclos AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría procurement-friction: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven economía de reducción 70% VRAM en GPUs consumer, pero la seguridad + governance empresarial demandan un plano de control managed que el CLI open-source no provee; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM. In plain language: El entrenamiento de LLMs local es ahora el doble de rápido y usa 70% menos VRAM — pronto las grandes nubes lo rentarán como servicio managed. In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay parehong may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance. In plain language: Ang local-LLM training ngayon ay dalawang beses na mas mabilis at gumagamit ng 70% mas kaunting VRAM — malapit na itong i-rent out ng malalaking clouds bilang managed service. In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.
nodes.description: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「GGUF 供給経路」がサプライチェーン攻撃の新しい主戦場** — SGLang CVE-2026-5760（GGUF 経由の Jinja2 SSTI で RCE）は「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリア」である現実を可視化した。2026 Q3 までに Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope は **モデルカード + chat_template の署名検証／サンドボックス実行** を標準要件化し、Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM も GGUF ロード時に SSTI スキャンをデフォルト有効化する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 4 clusters. Largest is 'Model Supply Chain' (9 of 9 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
nodes.short_label: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
nodes.title: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.en: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
title.ja: Q3 2026までにフロンティア・サイバー AI モデルが米国輸出管理カテゴリ化
title.es: Modelos cyber-AI de frontera se vuelven categoría US export-control para Q3 2026
title.fil: Frontier cyber-AI models magiging US export-control category by Q3 2026

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。 In plain language: NSA が Anthropic の最強 AI を借りて Microsoft のバグ探しを始めた以上、米政府は他に誰が借りられるかの規制を始めざるを得ない。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source. In plain language: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestado el AI más poderoso de Anthropic para encontrar bugs en Microsoft, EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarlo prestado. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills. In plain language: Nang sinimulan ng NSA na manghiram ng pinakamakapangyarihang AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang simulan ng US government na mag-regulate kung sino pang ibang puwedeng manghiram nito. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. detail.summary_short: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure.

summary_short_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure.
summary_short_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の
summary_short_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE.
summary_short_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure.

detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills. In plain language: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。 In plain language: NSA が Anthropic の最強 AI を借りて Microsoft のバグ探しを始めた以上、米政府は他に誰が借りられるかの規制を始めざるを得ない。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source. In plain language: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestado el AI más poderoso de Anthropic para encontrar bugs en Microsoft, EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarlo prestado. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills. In plain language: Nang sinimulan ng NSA na manghiram ng pinakamakapangyarihang AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang simulan ng US government na mag-regulate kung sino pang ibang puwedeng manghiram nito. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: 1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
