detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.title: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行** — DeepSeek V4 の「1M context をボルトオンではなくゼロから設計」方針、Qwen3.6-27B の 262K→1M、Claude Opus 4.7 の 1M token context（Bedrock）、GPT-5.5 の長文脈強化は同じ方向。2026 Q3 までに「native 1M context」がオープン重みの最低ラインとなり、32K-128K 止まりの既存モデルはレガシー扱いに転落。RAG パイプラインは「検索→コンテキスト挿入」から「全データをそのまま投入＋動的プルーニング」方式に主流シフトし、ベクトル DB ベンダは「長 context キャッシュ最適化層」として再定義を迫られる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. nodes.title: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.
nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

title.es: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.
title.fil: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.** In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **Physical AI の SaaS 化と「Robot-as-a-Service」基盤競争** — Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos の相次ぐ提携は、**ロボット制御モデルの訓練パイプラインがクラウド側に集約** される方向性を示す。2026 Q3 にはロボット 1 台あたりのクラウド計算課金（訓練 + 同期シミュ + ポリシ更新）がエンタープライズ契約の既定項目となり、ロボット本体は「動くコンピュート終端」として商品コモディティ化、メーカは **フリート管理ソフトウェアの経常収益** へシフトする。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.label: Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.
nodes.short_label: Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.
nodes.title: Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.
nodes.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「Physical AI の 8 時間本番稼働」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ調達条件に** — Siemens–Humanoid の HMND 01 Alpha が Erlangen で「デモではなく本番ライン」で **8 時間 / 90% 成功率 / 60 tote/h** を達成したことは、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」の段階からの明確な卒業点。2026 Q4 までに大手製造業（VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / トヨタ）の RFP から「24 時間連続稼働実績」「1 週間 MTBF」「90%+ 自律完了率」「既存 MES / PLC 統合」が事実上の足切り条件に組み込まれ、Physical AI の競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存 OT 環境への差し込み容易性」に完全に移る。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments." In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **「Physical AI 本番ライン稼働実績が IROS / GTC 2026 でのリーグテーブル化」を 2026 後半に開始** — Siemens Erlangen の **HMND 01 Alpha**（60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+）、BMW Spartanburg の **Figure 02**（10 ヶ月 / 30,000 台 / 9 万部品）、BMW Leipzig の **AEON**（Apr 2026 テスト → 夏パイロット）、GXO の **Digit**（10 万 tote 超）が同期間に並列達成し、Hannover Messe 2026 で物理 AI が「初の中心テーマ」となった事実は、業界が **「ベンダ自称デモ」→「OEM 採用本番稼働実績」** の評価基準シフトを始めたことを示す。2026 H2 の **IROS（10 月）** および **GTC Fall 2026** で「OEM 採用社数 × 連続稼働時間 × 部品稼働数 × MTBF」のリーグテーブル化が始まり、Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON の 5 強がベンチマーク上位を占める一方、PoC 段階から脱せない 30+ 社が 2026 Q4 中に資金枯渇 / 買収 / 撤退に追い込まれる。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. description.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。 In plain language: Tesla は年100万台のロボットを作るために大金を投じている — まもなくウォール街がそれを別個に開示せよと要求する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación. In plain language: Tesla está gastando mucho para hacer un millón de robots al año — pronto Wall Street exigirá ver esos costos desglosados. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles. In plain language: Gumagastos ang Tesla nang malaki para makagawa ng isang milyong robot kada taon — malapit nang hilingin ng Wall Street na makita iyong gastos nang hiwalay. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles. In plain language: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。 In plain language: Tesla は年100万台のロボットを作るために大金を投じている — まもなくウォール街がそれを別個に開示せよと要求する。 In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación. In plain language: Tesla está gastando mucho para hacer un millón de robots al año — pronto Wall Street exigirá ver esos costos desglosados. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles. In plain language: Gumagastos ang Tesla nang malaki para makagawa ng isang milyong robot kada taon — malapit nang hilingin ng Wall Street na makita iyong gastos nang hiwalay. In plain language: In plain language: In plain language:

nodes.title: Chip-vendor AI-accelerator-revenue 10-Q segment lands by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。 In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: Las ventas de chips AI en China de AMD acaban de caer 75 por ciento en un trimestre — Wall Street demandará que las empresas chip separen sus ingresos AI como una línea aparte. In plain language: In plain language:
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: Ang AMD's China AI chip sales ay bumagsak ng 75 percent sa isang quarter — hihingiin ng Wall Street sa mga chip companies na ihiwalay ang kanilang AI revenue bilang isang separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

summary.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure. In plain language: AMD's China AI chip sales just dropped 75 percent in one quarter — Wall Street will demand chip companies break out their AI revenue as a separate line. In plain language: In plain language:

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。 In plain language: AMDの中国向けAIチップ売上は1四半期で75%も落ちた — ウォール街はチップ企業に対しAI売上を別ラインとして分けて出すよう要求するだろう。 In plain language: In plain language:
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva. In plain language: Las ventas de chips AI en China de AMD acaban de caer 75 por ciento en un trimestre — Wall Street demandará que las empresas chip separen sus ingresos AI como una línea aparte. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.
